Software & Database Loading.clue: This is the first thing a technician verifies before loading an FMS navigation database update.
choices: Database effective date matches current AIRAC cycle
Aircraft has flown within the last 30 days
Autopilot servo self-test has passed
All cockpit displays are currently powered on

Software & Database Loading.clue: This is the correct action after a software load fails at 80% with INVALID displayed.
choices: Install the previous software version
Cycle power and attempt the load again
Return the unit to the manufacturer
Continue flight operations and retry later
Software & Database Loading.explanation: Cycle power and retry the load.

Software & Database Loading.clue: This action should always precede a software load on integrated avionics to prevent data loss.
choices: Reset all systems to factory defaults
Disconnect the aircraft battery
Export and save current configuration
Document the current display brightness settings

Software & Database Loading.clue: This is where the FMS 'compatible hardware configuration part number' is documented.
choices: Pilot operating handbook limitations
FMS operating manual table of contents
Navigation database header file
Aircraft equipment list or FMS data plate

Software & Database Loading.clue: This verification is required before returning a display unit to service after a software update.
choices: Operational test per maintenance manual procedures
Flight test verifying every display function
Manufacturer certification of the software version
FSDO inspector approval of the installation
